features.featureTitle: Implement a black-and-gold luxury design system across the entire app: deep black backgrounds (#0a0a0a, #111111), gold accent color (#C9A84C / #FFD700 range), bold serif or display font for headings (e.g. Cinzel or Playfair Display via Google Fonts), modern sans-serif for body text, gold hover effects on interactive elements, subtle gold glow animations on key UI elements, and smooth page transitions throughout.

Build the Home Page with the following sections in order: (1) Full-screen hero section with an auto-playing looping background video (club atmosphere), the 'Kala Ghoda' logo/wordmark centered, tagline 'Where Nights Come Alive', and two CTA buttons: 'View Upcoming Events' and 'Book Now'; (2) About section with a short intro paragraph about the club; (3) Upcoming Events preview showing the 3 most recent upcoming events as cards (event poster image, title, date, short description); (4) Gallery preview section showing a grid of sample club images; (5) Contact section with a placeholder Google Maps embed, phone number, and Instagram link; (6) Footer with social media icons (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp).

Build a dedicated Events Page at route /events displaying all events in a responsive grid layout. Each event card must show: event poster image, event title, date and time, short description, and a 'View Details' button that navigates to the individual event page. Events with 'Upcoming' status should be listed first; 'Past' events should be visually distinguished (e.g. desaturated or labeled).

Build an Individual Event Detail Page at route /events/:id. The page must include: a large full-width banner image (event poster), full event description, a horizontally scrollable or slider-style photo gallery for the event's uploaded photos (with lightbox on click), an embedded video player for the event video URL, a ticket price section, a prominent 'Book Now' button, and a live countdown timer showing days/hours/minutes/seconds until the event date.

Build a secure Admin Dashboard at route /admin. Protect the dashboard with a hardcoded credential login screen (username + password stored in backend, no external auth). On login, store a session token in localStorage and validate it on each admin page visit. The dashboard must support: adding a new event (form with all fields), editing an existing event, deleting an event (with confirmation), uploading event poster, multiple gallery photos, and a video URL, toggling event status between Upcoming and Past.

Add a smooth scroll-reveal animation system so that sections animate into view as the user scrolls down (fade-in + slight upward translate). Apply these animations to the About section, Upcoming Events cards, Gallery preview, and Contact section on the Home page, and to event cards on the Events page.

Add a floating WhatsApp booking button fixed to the bottom-right corner of every page. The button should link to a WhatsApp chat URL (wa.me/ format) with a pre-filled message like 'Hi, I'd like to book a table at Kala Ghoda'. Use a WhatsApp green icon with gold border styling to match the brand.

Add a Newsletter Subscription section on the Home Page (above the footer). It should include a heading like 'Stay in the Loop', a brief description, an email input field, and a 'Subscribe' button. Store subscriber emails in the backend with a subscribeNewsletter(email) function and a listSubscribers query for admin visibility.

Generate static image assets for the application: (1) A hero background fallback image for the home page (in case the video cannot load), showing a cinematic nightclub interior in black and gold tones. (2) A 'Kala Ghoda' logo/wordmark in gold on transparent background. (3) Three placeholder event poster images in dark luxury style for the seeded demo events. (4) A gallery grid of 6 atmospheric nightclub photos for the home page gallery preview.
